Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.FollowUpTask

Represents a follow up task.

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
Title

Task title.

 string

None.
LocationTitle

The name of the course that the task belong.

 string

None.
NumberOfNewOrUpdatedSubmissions

The number of new and updated submissions for activities where the teacher does not need to assess manually. Submissions are considered new or updated if they happen since teacher last visited the activity.

 integer

None.
NumberOfSubmissionsToAssess

The number of submissions for activities where the teacher need to assess manually.

 integer

None.
TotalNumberOfEvaluateSubmissions

Sum of and .

 integer

None.
Url

The itslearning internal URL for the task.

 string

None.
ContentUrl

The itslearning content URL for the task.

 string

None.
IconUrl

Url to related element icon.

 string

None.
BrandIconUrl

Url to a branded element icon. Used in tasklist's teacher view

 string

None.
ElementId

The identifier of related element.

 integer

None.
ElementType

Type of related element.

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.ElementType

None.
LearningToolId

Identifier of learning tool (Assignment extension, test extension etc.). It's 0 for native itslearning elements. This field applicable only if ElementType is LearningToolElement.

 integer

None.
